



Autogenerateddirectory
======================

.. py:class:: Autogenerateddirectory(terms)
   :canonical: src.pyconverter.xml2py.version_variables.Autogenerateddirectory





   Contains the version variables of the XML documentation.
















   ..
       !! processed by numpydoc !!












Overview
--------
.. py:currentmodule:: Autogenerateddirectory
.. tab-set::




    .. tab-item:: Properties

        .. list-table::
          :header-rows: 0
          :widths: auto

          * - :py:attr:`~autogenerated_directory_name`
            - Autogenerated directory name.
          * - :py:attr:`~version`
            - Version of the XML documentation.
          * - :py:attr:`~base_url`
            - Base URL of the HTML documentation.
          * - :py:attr:`~cmd_base_url`
            - Command base URL.
